description_long: This cabin features a steeply pitched gable roof with a ribbed texture, likely constructed from wooden shingles or tiles. The exterior walls are patterned with a brick or tile motif in warm reddish and brown tones, giving it a rustic yet orderly appearance. The front facade is dominated by a centered, rectangular doorway accessed by a short set of stairs, with no visible windows on the front or rear. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, creating modest eaves on all sides. The structure is elevated on short supports, suggesting protection from ground moisture or flooding. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential or small community use in an urban or park setting.
description: A rustic cabin with a steep gable roof, patterned brick-like walls, a central front door, and no visible windows, elevated on short supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central doorway, stairs, and patterned facade with no windows.
description_view_1: Side or rear view highlighting the ribbed gable roof and absence of doors or windows.
description_view_2: Identical to the front view, displaying the central entrance and patterned wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side or rear view, again showing the ribbed roof and no visible openings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with ribbed wooden or tile shingles and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; the facade is solid with a patterned brick or tile motif
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed by stairs
